channel.title: Work in Progress | Ian Buller, PhD, MA
channel.copyright: © Ian Buller, 2026 · Opinions expressed are my own

item.title: Putting Cancer and Environmental Exposures in (Geo)spatial Perspective
item.description:
I gave an invited talk at the Center for Science and Technology in the Radiation Protection Division of the Office of Air and Radiation of the U.S. Environmental Protection Agency entitled “Putting cancer and environmental exposures in (geo)spatial perspective.”

The talk was an overview of my work in progress over the past year in the Cancer Prevention Fellowship Program.

item.title: A Place for Spatial Analysis in the Cancer Control Continuum
item.description:
I gave an invited talk at the National Cancer Institute entitled “A place for spatial analysis in the Cancer Control Continuum.”

The talk was an overview of my work in progress over the past year in the Cancer Prevention Fellowship Program. The talk was recorded, so please contact me if you are interested in viewing the talk.
